form.title: Reservation deposit for two-bedroom apartment
form.description: Reservation of Unit B14 at Cedar Court, Sangotedo, pending document review and execution of the sale agreement.
form.releaseConditions: Complete after the buyer receives and acknowledges the offer letter, allocation details, and deposit receipt.

form.title: Abandoned agent and inspection fee record
form.description: Proposed inspection and agency engagement for a three-bedroom flat in Gwarinpa.
form.releaseConditions: Complete after inspection confirmation and written evidence of the agent's authority is attached.

form.title: Interstate haulage for packaged foods
form.description: Dedicated truck delivery from Lagos to three distribution points in Abuja and Kaduna.
form.releaseConditions: Release after signed waybills and delivery confirmations are received from all three locations.

form.title: Monthly Lagos last-mile deliveries
form.description: Monthly shared-load and last-mile delivery service for twelve GreenBasket retail locations.
form.releaseConditions: Release monthly after delivery scans and signed store receipts are uploaded for all locations.
